title: pelargonium × cucumerinum
intro: Pelargonium × cucumerinum, also known as the Geranium or Sweet Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, known for its distinctive flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds such as geraniol, linalool, and citronellol, which have been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × cucumerinum include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to create remedies for a range of ailments.
